title: carex caryophyllea var. microtricha
intro: Carex caryophyllea var. microtricha is a variant of the Carex caryophyllea plant, a type of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, known for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory ailments, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Carex caryophyllea var. microtricha can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for the extraction of its active compounds and utilization of its medicinal and health benefits.
